# Muhammad Hafizh Maulidan — Operations & Production Leader

> Head of Unit at Rumah Susu Indonesia. Specializing in dairy manufacturing, production optimization, and quality systems.

## Quick Links
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hafizhmaulidan/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/hafizhmaulidan15)
- [Portfolio](https://portfolio-muhammad-hafizh-maulidan.vercel.app)

## Core Expertise
- Operations & Production Management
- Dairy Manufacturing & Cold Chain
- SOP Development & QC Systems
- Supply Chain Coordination
- Process Optimization
- Team Leadership

## Key Metrics
- 2,000–3,500 L/week production volume
- <1% quality reject rate
- 4-person lean team
- 25,000 units/batch capacity
